scripts.build: pnpm --filter @quran-ai/contracts build && pnpm --filter @quran-ai/quran-data build && pnpm --filter @quran-ai/web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @quran-ai/contracts test && pnpm --filter @quran-ai/quran-data test && pnpm --filter @quran-ai/web test && cargo test --manifest-path services/realtime-gateway/Cargo.toml && DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://hawzhin@localhost:5432/quran_ai}" cargo test --manifest-path services/platform-api/Cargo.toml -- --include-ignored
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @quran-ai/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @quran-ai/quran-data typecheck && pnpm --filter @quran-ai/web typecheck
